name: zen-relay-zk-demo
description: Minimal ZK proof demo for Zen Relay — preimage and Merkle path circuits (Circom + snarkjs)

scripts.setup:preimage: snarkjs groth16 setup build/preimage/preimage.r1cs pot12_final.ptau build/preimage/preimage_0000.zkey && snarkjs zkey contribute build/preimage/preimage_0000.zkey build/preimage/preimage_final.zkey --name="Zen Relay demo" -v
